pricing: WMTX/USD from DIA Oracle V2 key-value feed via unverified adapter, treated as WMTX/USDC assuming USDC/USD parity.
notes: Mutable delegate points to unverified adapter at 0xEc7E3dAc...38Fb; no staleness check on feed timestamp. Delegate can be changed at any time by owner (0x06F6...9E50). DIA feed is permissioned — only authorized updaters post prices. Feed updated ~2 min, data was fresh at inspection. Single data source with no redundancy. 8-decimals underlying feed.
